description_long: This lamp features a spherical bulb encased in an intricate, openwork lattice structure made of black metal, giving it a modern and decorative appearance. The lattice is composed of interlocking circular and oval loops, creating a visually striking mesh that allows visibility of the inner light source. The base of the lamp mimics the threaded design of a standard light bulb socket, also rendered in black metal, providing a realistic and functional look. The interior contains a visible filament or LED structure, suggesting it is designed to emit light in all directions through the open mesh. The overall design is both utilitarian and artistic, making it suitable for urban environments where aesthetics and function are both valued. Its robust metal construction and open design make it a standout feature in public or semi-public spaces.
description: A spherical lamp with a black metal lattice mesh encasing the bulb and a realistic threaded base, blending modern aesthetics with functional lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spherical lattice structure and the detailed threaded base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the side mesh pattern and the inner light source.
description_view_2: Direct rear view with the lattice pattern fully visible and the base centered.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the depth of the mesh and partial visibility of the inner filament.
